title: Keto German Glazed Pork Chops
description: A delicious keto take on traditional German cuisine, featuring glazed pork chops served with a side of fried rice.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and thyme.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear pork chops for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer pork chops to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked to 145°F (63°C).
Meanwhile, cook glazed rice according to package instructions.
Heat a separate skillet with a small amount of oil over medium-high heat.
Add cooked fried rice to the skillet and stir-fry until crispy and golden brown.
Serve pork chops with glazed rice and fried rice on the side.
